title: Unauthenticated admin analytics read and log deletion APIs
broken_control: no authentication or authorization check before DB read/delete
sink: D1 SELECT of analytics logs and DELETE FROM search/click/calculation logs
impact: analytics exposure and integrity loss by unauthenticated users

title: DOM XSS through unescaped search and data names rendered with innerHTML
source: user-entered search query and imported generated medical item/disease strings
sink: browser DOM HTML parser on same-origin page
impact: script execution in user browser; can call same-origin APIs available to page

title: Admin inline onclick values use HTML escaping in JavaScript string context
source: D1 log values rendered into admin page inline onclick attributes
broken_control: HTML escaping is not equivalent to JavaScript string escaping
impact: possible stored admin-page XSS; browser PoC not completed

title: Local backend prefix path check permits sibling frontend-prefixed paths
source: HTTP URL path decoded by backend server
broken_control: startsWith(FRONTEND_DIR) prefix check does not enforce path boundary
impact: would read sibling directories named frontend* if present; none found in current repo and backend appears local/dev-only
